title: mazus miquelii f. rotundifolius
intro: Mazus miquelii f. rotundifolius, also known as Japanese mazus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Mazaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mazus miquelii f. rotundifolius include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for consumption.
